Home.headline: Bring team decisions together in one place
Home.description: This is the Questboard Next.js frontend scaffold. It ships with design tokens, FontAwesome, and i18n from the start.
Home.developmentAuthBadge: Development mode is treated as already authenticated
Home.designTokensDescription: CSS variables are imported directly from token files.
Home.localesDescription: ja, en, fr, zh, ru, es, ar

Auth.loginDescription: Use Google OAuth and reCAPTCHA to sign in.
Auth.developmentHeading: Development mode is treated as already authenticated
Auth.developmentDescription: This development-only branch never appears in production UI.
Auth.callbackDescription: Sending the authorization code and reCAPTCHA token.
Auth.callbackRecovery: Go back to the login screen and try again.

BoardCreate.heading: Create a board
BoardCreate.description: Create a board and generate a share URL.
BoardCreate.signInHint: Use the sign-in panel above to create a board.
BoardCreate.successDescription: Share the URL for “{title}” with your team.

BoardInvite.heading: Join a board
BoardInvite.description: Open the share URL and choose the role you want to join with.
